<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Imagick\Analyzers; use Intervention\Image\Analyzers\HeightAnalyzer as GenericHeightAnalyzer; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\SpecializedInterface; class HeightAnalyzer extends GenericHeightAnalyzer implements SpecializedInterface { public function analyze(ImageInterface $image): mixed { return $image->core()->native()->getImageHeight(); } }
